metadata.name: Customer Inquires About Checking Fluid Levels

description: A customer wants to know how to check their vehicle's basic fluid levels, like engine oil and washer fluid.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer's vehicle model and year.
Access the digital owner's manual to find the diagrams showing the location of the engine oil dipstick and washer fluid reservoir.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent pulls up the relevant diagrams.

nodes.task_description: Verbally guide the customer on how to safely check the oil level (engine off, on level ground) and how to top up the washer fluid.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent provides clear, safe, and accurate instructions.
